   171â†’  // Todos page
   172â†’  writeFileSync(
   173â†’    join(output, 'todos', 'index.html'),
   174â†’    renderTodos(todoFiles, t),
   175â†’    'utf-8',
   176â†’  )
   177â†’
   178â†’  // Archive page
   179â†’  writeFileSync(
   180â†’    join(output, 'archive', 'index.html'),
   181â†’    renderArchive(archiveFiles, t),
   182â†’    'utf-8',
   183â†’  )
   184â†’
   185â†’  // Projects page
   186â†’  writeFileSync(
   187â†’    join(output, 'projects', 'index.html'),
   188â†’    renderProjects(manifests, t),
   189â†’    'utf-8',
   190â†’  )
   191â†’
   192â†’  // Knowledge graph
   193â†’  writeFileSync(
   194â†’    join(output, 'graph.html'),
   195â†’    renderGraph(manifests, knowledgeFiles, linkGraph, t),
   196â†’    'utf-8',
   197â†’  )
   198â†’
   199â†’  // Search
   200â†’  const searchIndex = buildSearchIndex(manifests, m => snippets[m.session_id] ?? '')
   201â†’  writeFileSync(join(output, 'search.html'), renderSearchPage(searchIndex, t), 'utf-8')
   202â†’
   203â†’  // GitHub Pages deployment (non-blocking on failure)
   204â†’  if (ghPagesBranch) {
   205â†’    try {
   206â†’      const { deployGithubPages } = await import('./deploy/github-pages.js')
   207â†’      await deployGithubPages({ repoRoot: root, outputDir: output, branch: ghPagesBranch, cname })
   208â†’    } catch {
   209â†’      // Logged inside deployGithubPages
   210â†’    }
   211â†’  } else if (cname) {
   212â†’    // Write CNAME even without deploy (writeFileSync already imported at top)
   213â†’    writeFileSync(join(output, 'CNAME'), cname + '\n', 'utf-8')
   214â†’  }
   215â†’
   216â†’  // Webhook notification (non-blocking on failure)
   217â†’  if (webhookUrl) {
   218â†’    try {
   219â†’      const { sendWebhook } = await import('./deploy/webhook.js')
   220â†’      await sendWebhook({
   221â†’        url: webhookUrl,
   222â†’        sessionCount: manifests.length,
   223â†’        newSessionIds,
   224â†’      })
   225â†’    } catch {
   226â†’      // Logged inside sendWebhook
   227â†’    }
   228â†’  }
   229â†’}

   231â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   232â†’// Manifest loading
   233â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   234â†’
   235â†’function loadManifests(root: string): ManifestEntry[] {
   236â†’  const manifestsDir = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts', 'manifests')
   237â†’  if (!existsSync(manifestsDir)) return []
   238â†’
   239â†’  const manifests: ManifestEntry[] = []
   240â†’  loadManifestsRecursive(manifestsDir, manifests)
   241â†’  return manifests
   242â†’}
   243â†’
   244â†’function loadManifestsRecursive(dir: string, out: ManifestEntry[]): void {
   245â†’  let entries: string[]
   246â†’  try {
   247â†’    entries = readdirSync(dir)
   248â†’  } catch {
   249â†’    return
   250â†’  }
   251â†’
   252â†’  for (const entry of entries) {
   253â†’    const fullPath = join(dir, entry)
   254â†’    if (entry.endsWith('.json')) {

   256â†’        const raw = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
   257â†’        const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as ManifestEntry
   258â†’        if (parsed.session_id && parsed.client) {
   259â†’          out.push(parsed)

   261â†’      } catch {
   262â†’        // Skip malformed manifests
   263â†’      }

   271â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   272â†’// Clean markdown message parsing
   273â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   274â†’
   275â†’/** Parse messages from a clean markdown file. */
   276â†’export function parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): RenderedMessage[] {
   277â†’  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path
   278â†’    ? join(root, m.repo_clean_path)
   279â†’    : m.global_clean_path
   280â†’  if (!cleanPath || !existsSync(cleanPath)) return []
   281â†’
   282â†’  let content: string
   283â†’  try {
   284â†’    content = readFileSync(cleanPath, 'utf-8')
   285â†’  } catch {
   286â†’    return []
   287â†’  }
   288â†’
   289â†’  return parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content)
   290â†’}
   291â†’
   292â†’/** Extract role/timestamp/text from clean markdown format. */
   293â†’export function parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content: string): RenderedMessage[] {
   294â†’  const messages: RenderedMessage[] = []
   295â†’
   296â†’  // Find ## Messages section
   297â†’  const msgSection = content.indexOf('\n## Messages')
   298â†’  if (msgSection === -1) return []
   299â†’
   300â†’  const body = content.slice(msgSection + 12) // after "## Messages\n"
   301â†’
   302â†’  // Split on ### N. role headers
   303â†’  const msgRe = /^### \d+\.\s+(\w+)/gm
   304â†’  let match: RegExpExecArray | null
   305â†’  const starts: Array<{ index: number; role: string }> = []
   306â†’
   307â†’  while ((match = msgRe.exec(body)) !== null) {
   308â†’    starts.push({ index: match.index, role: match[1] ?? 'unknown' })
   309â†’  }
   310â†’
   311â†’  for (let i = 0; i < starts.length; i++) {
   312â†’    const start = starts[i]
   313â†’    if (!start) continue
   314â†’    const nextStart = starts[i + 1]
   315â†’    const chunk = nextStart
   316â†’      ? body.slice(start.index, nextStart.index)
   317â†’      : body.slice(start.index)
   318â†’
   319â†’    const lines = chunk.split('\n')
   320â†’    // First line is the header, second may be timestamp
   321â†’    let timestamp = ''
   322â†’    const textLines: string[] = []
   323â†’    let pastHeader = false
   324â†’
   325â†’    for (const line of lines) {
   326â†’      if (!pastHeader && line.startsWith('### ')) {
   327â†’        pastHeader = true
   328â†’        continue
   329â†’      }
   330â†’      if (!pastHeader) continue
   331â†’      const tsMatch = line.match(/^- Timestamp:\s*`([^`]+)`/)
   332â†’      if (tsMatch && !timestamp) {
   333â†’        timestamp = tsMatch[1] ?? ''
   334â†’        continue
   335â†’      }
   336â†’      textLines.push(line)
   337â†’    }
   338â†’
   339â†’    // Remove leading/trailing blank lines from text
   340â†’    const text = textLines.join('\n').trim()
   341â†’    if (text || timestamp) {
   342â†’      messages.push({ role: start.role, timestamp, text })
   343â†’    }
   344â†’  }
   345â†’
   346â†’  return messages
   347â†’}
   348â†’
   349â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   350â†’// Raw transcript tool extraction
   351â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   352â†’
   353â†’/** Best-effort extraction of tool event summaries from a raw JSONL file. */
   354â†’function extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath: string, _client: string): string[] {
   355â†’  const summaries: string[] = []
   356â†’  let content: string
   357â†’  try {
   358â†’    content = readFileSync(rawPath, 'utf-8')
   359â†’  } catch {
   360â†’    return []
   361â†’  }
   362â†’
   363â†’  for (const line of content.split('\n')) {
   364â†’    const trimmed = line.trim()
   365â†’    if (!trimmed) continue
   366â†’    try {
   367â†’      const record = JSON.parse(trimmed) as Record<string, unknown>
   368â†’      // Codex: function_call type
   369â†’      const type = record['type'] as string | undefined
   370â†’      if (type === 'function_call' || type === 'custom_tool_call') {
   371â†’        const name = (record['name'] as string | undefined) ?? type
   372â†’        summaries.push(name)
   373â†’        continue
   374â†’      }
   375â†’      // Claude: tool_use content blocks
   376â†’      const payload = record['message'] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined
   377â†’      const content2 = (payload?.['content'] ?? record['content']) as unknown[] | undefined
   378â†’      if (Array.isArray(content2)) {
   379â†’        for (const block of content2) {
   380â†’          if (
   381â†’            block !== null &&
   382â†’            typeof block === 'object' &&
   383â†’            (block as Record<string, unknown>)['type'] === 'tool_use'
   384â†’          ) {
   385â†’            const name = ((block as Record<string, unknown>)['name'] as string | undefined) ?? 'tool_use'
   386â†’            summaries.push(name)
   387â†’          }
   388â†’        }
   389â†’      }
   390â†’    } catch {
   391â†’      // Skip malformed lines
   392â†’    }
   393â†’  }
   394â†’
   395â†’  return summaries
   396â†’}
   397â†’
   398â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   399â†’// Output path helpers
   400â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   401â†’
   402â†’function transcriptOutputPath(output: string, m: ManifestEntry): string {
   403â†’  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''
   404â†’  const stem = cleanPath ? basename(cleanPath, '.md') : m.session_id
   405â†’  return join(output, 'transcripts', m.client, `${stem}.html`)
   406â†’}
   407â†’
   408â†’function resolveRawPath(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): string | null {
   409â†’  if (m.repo_raw_path) {
   410â†’    return join(root, m.repo_raw_path)
   411â†’  }
   412â†’  if (m.global_raw_path) {
   413â†’    return m.global_raw_path
   414â†’  }
   415â†’  return null
   416â†’}
   417â†’
   418â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   419â†’// Markdown file loader (for goals/knowledge/todos/archive)
   420â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   421â†’
   422â†’function loadMarkdownFiles(dir: string): Array<{ filename: string; title: string; content: string }> {
   423â†’  if (!existsSync(dir)) return []
   424â†’
   425â†’  let entries: string[]
   426â†’  try {
   427â†’    entries = readdirSync(dir)
   428â†’  } catch {
   429â†’    return []
   430â†’  }
   431â†’
   432â†’  return entries
   433â†’    .filter(e => e.endsWith('.md'))
   434â†’    .sort()
   435â†’    .map(filename => {
   436â†’      const fullPath = join(dir, filename)
   437â†’      let content = ''
   438â†’      try {
   439â†’        content = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
   440â†’      } catch {
   441â†’        // empty
   442â†’      }
   443â†’      const title = extractMarkdownTitle(content) || basename(filename, '.md')
   444â†’      return { filename, title, content }
   445â†’    })
   446â†’}
   447â†’
   448â†’function extractMarkdownTitle(content: string): string {
   449â†’  const match = content.match(/^#\s+(.+)$/m)
   450â†’  return match?.[1]?.trim() ?? ''
   451â†’}
   452â†’
   453â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   454â†’// .gitignore management
   455â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   456â†’
   457â†’export function ensureGitignore(root: string, entry: string): void {
   458â†’  const gitignorePath = join(root, '.gitignore')
   459â†’  let existing = ''
   460â†’  if (existsSync(gitignorePath)) {
   461â†’    try {
   462â†’      existing = readFileSync(gitignorePath, 'utf-8')
   463â†’    } catch {
   464â†’      return
   465â†’    }
   466â†’  }
   467â†’  // Check if already present (normalize line endings)
   468â†’  const lines = existing.replace(/\r\n/g, '\n').split('\n')
   469â†’  if (lines.some(l => l.trim() === entry.trim())) return
   470â†’
   471â†’  // Append with trailing newline
   472â†’  const append = existing.endsWith('\n') ? entry + '\n' : '\n' + entry + '\n'
   473â†’  try {
   474â†’    appendFileSync(gitignorePath, append, 'utf-8')
   475â†’  } catch {
   476â†’    // Best-effort
   477â†’  }
   478â†’}

1â†’/**
     2â†’ * Report build orchestrator.
     3â†’ * Generates a self-contained multi-page HTML website in Memory/07_reports/.
     4â†’ */
     5â†’
     6â†’import {
     7â†’  existsSync,
     8â†’  mkdirSync,
     9â†’  readdirSync,
    10â†’  readFileSync,
    11â†’  writeFileSync,
    12â†’  appendFileSync,
    13â†’} from 'node:fs'
    14â†’import { basename, dirname, join, relative } from 'node:path'
    15â†’
    16â†’import type { BuildReportOptions } from '../types/report.js'
    17â†’import type { ManifestEntry } from '../types/transcript.js'
    18â†’import { computeStats, extractToolNames, accumulateToolCounts } from './stats.js'
    19â†’import { renderDashboard } from './render/dashboard.js'
    20â†’import { renderTranscriptList } from './render/transcript-list.js'
    21â†’import { renderTranscript } from './render/transcript.js'
    22â†’import type { RenderedMessage } from './render/transcript.js'
    23â†’import { renderKnowledge } from './render/knowledge.js'
    24â†’import type { KnowledgeFile } from './render/knowledge.js'
    25â†’import { renderGoals } from './render/goals.js'
    26â†’import type { GoalFile } from './render/goals.js'
    27â†’import { renderTodos } from './render/todos.js'
    28â†’import { renderArchive } from './render/archive.js'
    29â†’import { renderProjects } from './render/projects.js'
    30â†’import { renderGraph } from './render/graph.js'
    31â†’import { buildSearchIndex, renderSearchPage } from './render/search.js'
    32â†’import { buildLinkGraph } from './render/links.js'
    33â†’import { getSummary } from './summarize.js'
    34â†’import type { SummaryOptions } from './summarize.js'
    35â†’import { loadLocale } from './i18n/index.js'
    36â†’import type { Translations } from './i18n/types.js'
    37â†’import { getLogger } from '../heartbeat/log.js'
    38â†’
    39â†’const DEFAULT_MODEL = 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'
    40â†’
    41â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    42â†’// Main entry point
    43â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    44â†’
    45â†’export async function buildReport(options: BuildReportOptions): Promise<void> {
    46â†’  const { root, output } = options
    47â†’  const noAi = options.noAi ?? false
    48â†’  const model = options.model ?? DEFAULT_MODEL
    49â†’  const locale = options.locale ?? 'en'
    50â†’  const ghPagesBranch = options.ghPagesBranch ?? ''
    51â†’  const cname = options.cname ?? ''
    52â†’  const webhookUrl = options.webhookUrl ?? ''
    53â†’  const newSessionIds = options.newSessionIds ?? []
    54â†’
    55â†’  // Cache lives outside the gitignored output dir so it survives rm -rf
    56â†’  const cacheDir = join(root, 'Memory', '.report-cache')
    57â†’
    58â†’  // Load translations
    59â†’  const t: Translations = loadLocale(locale)
    60â†’
    61â†’  // Ensure output dirs exist
    62â†’  mkdirSync(output, { recursive: true })
    63â†’  mkdirSync(join(output, 'transcripts'), { recursive: true })
    64â†’  mkdirSync(join(output, 'goals'), { recursive: true })
    65â†’  mkdirSync(join(output, 'knowledge'), { recursive: true })
    66â†’  mkdirSync(join(output, 'todos'), { recursive: true })
    67â†’  mkdirSync(join(output, 'archive'), { recursive: true })
    68â†’  mkdirSync(join(output, 'projects'), { recursive: true })
    69â†’  mkdirSync(cacheDir, { recursive: true })
    70â†’
    71â†’  // Ensure Memory/07_reports is gitignored
    72â†’  ensureGitignore(root, 'Memory/07_reports/')
    73â†’
    74â†’  // Load all manifests
    75â†’  const manifests = loadManifests(root)
    76â†’
    77â†’  // Build link graph from clean markdown
    78â†’  const linkGraph = buildLinkGraph(manifests, root)
    79â†’
    80â†’  // Accumulate tool counts while processing transcripts
    81â†’  let toolCounts: Record<string, number> = {}
    82â†’
    83â†’  // Summary options
    84â†’  const summaryOptions: SummaryOptions = { cacheDir, noAi, model }
    85â†’
    86â†’  // Process each transcript: parse â†’ summarize â†’ render â†’ write â†’ discard
    87â†’  const snippets: Record<string, string> = {}
    88â†’  const summaries: Record<string, string> = {}
    89â†’  const summaryPromises: Array<Promise<void>> = []
    90â†’
    91â†’  for (const m of manifests) {
    92â†’    const messages = parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m, root)
    93â†’
    94â†’    // Tool events from parsed transcript (try raw path)
    95â†’    const rawPath = resolveRawPath(m, root)
    96â†’    if (rawPath && existsSync(rawPath)) {
    97â†’      try {
    98â†’        const toolSummaries = extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath, m.client)
    99â†’        const names = extractToolNames(toolSummaries)
   100â†’        toolCounts = accumulateToolCounts(toolCounts, names)
   101â†’      } catch {
   102â†’        // Skip if raw parsing fails
   103â†’      }
   104â†’    }
   105â†’
   106â†’    // Search snippet from first message text
   107â†’    const firstMsg = messages[0]
   108â†’    snippets[m.session_id] = firstMsg ? firstMsg.text.slice(0, 300) : ''
   109â†’
   110â†’    // Summarize + render (deferred to allow parallel API calls)
   111â†’    const manifest = m
   112â†’    const msgs = messages
   113â†’    summaryPromises.push(
   114â†’      (async () => {
   115â†’        try {
   116â†’        const summary = await getSummary(manifest.raw_sha256, msgs, summaryOptions)
   117â†’        summaries[manifest.session_id] = summary
   118â†’        const backlinkIds = linkGraph.backlinks[manifest.session_id] ?? []
   119â†’        const backlinkManifests = backlinkIds
   120â†’          .map(id => manifests.find(x => x.session_id === id))
   121â†’          .filter((x): x is ManifestEntry => x !== undefined)
   122â†’
   123â†’        const html = renderTranscript(msgs, manifest, summary, backlinkManifests, t)
   124â†’        const outPath = transcriptOutputPath(output, manifest)
   125â†’        mkdirSync(dirname(outPath), { recursive: true })
   126â†’        writeFileSync(outPath, html, 'utf-8')
   127â†’        } catch (err: unknown) {
   128â†’          // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
   129â†’          getLogger().warn(`[build] Failed to render ${manifest.session_id}: ${String(err)}`)
   130â†’        }
   131â†’      })(),
   132â†’    )
   133â†’  }
   134â†’
   135â†’  // Wait for all transcript renders (parallel, bounded by semaphore in summarize.ts)
   136â†’  await Promise.all(summaryPromises)
   137â†’
   138â†’  // Compute final stats with accumulated tool counts
   139â†’  const stats = computeStats(manifests, toolCounts)
   140â†’
   141â†’  // Load markdown content for various pages
   142â†’  const goalFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '01_goals'))
   143â†’  const todoFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '02_todos'))
   144â†’  const knowledgeFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '04_knowledge'))
   145â†’  const archiveFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '05_archive'))
   146â†’
   147â†’  // Dashboard
   148â†’  writeFileSync(join(output, 'index.html'), renderDashboard(stats, manifests, t), 'utf-8')
   149â†’
   150â†’  // Session list
   151â†’  writeFileSync(
   152â†’    join(output, 'transcripts', 'index.html'),
   153â†’    renderTranscriptList(manifests, t, summaries),
   154â†’    'utf-8',
   155â†’  )
   156â†’
   157â†’  // Goals page
   158â†’  writeFileSync(
   159â†’    join(output, 'goals', 'index.html'),
   160â†’    renderGoals(goalFiles, t),
   161â†’    'utf-8',
   162â†’  )
   163â†’
   164â†’  // Knowledge page
   165â†’  writeFileSync(
   166â†’    join(output, 'knowledge', 'index.html'),
   167â†’    renderKnowledge(knowledgeFiles, t),
   168â†’    'utf-8',
   169â†’  )
   170â†’
   171â†’  // Todos page
   172â†’  writeFileSync(
   173â†’    join(output, 'todos', 'index.html'),
   174â†’    renderTodos(todoFiles, t),
   175â†’    'utf-8',
   176â†’  )
   177â†’
   178â†’  // Archive page
   179â†’  writeFileSync(
   180â†’    join(output, 'archive', 'index.html'),
   181â†’    renderArchive(archiveFiles, t),
   182â†’    'utf-8',
   183â†’  )
   184â†’
   185â†’  // Projects page
   186â†’  writeFileSync(
   187â†’    join(output, 'projects', 'index.html'),
   188â†’    renderProjects(manifests, t),
   189â†’    'utf-8',
   190â†’  )
   191â†’
   192â†’  // Knowledge graph
   193â†’  writeFileSync(
   194â†’    join(output, 'graph.html'),
   195â†’    renderGraph(manifests, knowledgeFiles, linkGraph, t),
   196â†’    'utf-8',
   197â†’  )
   198â†’
   199â†’  // Search
   200â†’  const searchIndex = buildSearchIndex(manifests, m => snippets[m.session_id] ?? '')
   201â†’  writeFileSync(join(output, 'search.html'), renderSearchPage(searchIndex, t), 'utf-8')
   202â†’
   203â†’  // GitHub Pages deployment (non-blocking on failure)
   204â†’  if (ghPagesBranch) {
   205â†’    try {
   206â†’      const { deployGithubPages } = await import('./deploy/github-pages.js')
   207â†’      await deployGithubPages({ repoRoot: root, outputDir: output, branch: ghPagesBranch, cname })
   208â†’    } catch {
   209â†’      // Logged inside deployGithubPages
   210â†’    }
   211â†’  } else if (cname) {
   212â†’    // Write CNAME even without deploy (writeFileSync already imported at top)
   213â†’    writeFileSync(join(output, 'CNAME'), cname + '\n', 'utf-8')
   214â†’  }

   271â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

   274â†’
   275â†’/** Parse messages from a clean markdown file. */
   276â†’export function parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): RenderedMessage[] {
   277â†’  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path
   278â†’    ? join(root, m.repo_clean_path)

   280â†’  if (!cleanPath || !existsSync(cleanPath)) return []
   281â†’
   282â†’  let content: string
   283â†’  try {
   284â†’    content = readFileSync(cleanPath, 'utf-8')
   285â†’  } catch {
   286â†’    return []
   287â†’  }

   292â†’/** Extract role/timestamp/text from clean markdown format. */
   293â†’export function parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content: string): RenderedMessage[] {
   294â†’  const messages: RenderedMessage[] = []
   295â†’
   296â†’  // Find ## Messages section
   297â†’  const msgSection = content.indexOf('\n## Messages')
   298â†’  if (msgSection === -1) return []
   299â†’
   300â†’  const body = content.slice(msgSection + 12) // after "## Messages\n"
   301â†’
   302â†’  // Split on ### N. role headers
   303â†’  const msgRe = /^### \d+\.\s+(\w+)/gm
   304â†’  let match: RegExpExecArray | null
   305â†’  const starts: Array<{ index: number; role: string }> = []
   306â†’
   307â†’  while ((match = msgRe.exec(body)) !== null) {
   308â†’    starts.push({ index: match.index, role: match[1] ?? 'unknown' })
   309â†’  }
   310â†’
   311â†’  for (let i = 0; i < starts.length; i++) {
   312â†’    const start = starts[i]
   313â†’    if (!start) continue
   314â†’    const nextStart = starts[i + 1]
   315â†’    const chunk = nextStart
   316â†’      ? body.slice(start.index, nextStart.index)
   317â†’      : body.slice(start.index)
   318â†’
   319â†’    const lines = chunk.split('\n')
   320â†’    // First line is the header, second may be timestamp
   321â†’    let timestamp = ''
   322â†’    const textLines: string[] = []
   323â†’    let pastHeader = false
   324â†’
   325â†’    for (const line of lines) {
   326â†’      if (!pastHeader && line.startsWith('### ')) {
   327â†’        pastHeader = true
   328â†’        continue
   329â†’      }
   330â†’      if (!pastHeader) continue
   331â†’      const tsMatch = line.match(/^- Timestamp:\s*`([^`]+)`/)
   332â†’      if (tsMatch && !timestamp) {
   333â†’        timestamp = tsMatch[1] ?? ''
   334â†’        continue
   335â†’      }
   336â†’      textLines.push(line)
   337â†’    }
   338â†’
   339â†’    // Remove leading/trailing blank lines from text
   340â†’    const text = textLines.join('\n').trim()
   341â†’    if (text || timestamp) {
   342â†’      messages.push({ role: start.role, timestamp, text })
   343â†’    }
   344â†’  }
   345â†’
   346â†’  return messages
   347â†’}

   349â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   350â†’// Raw transcript tool extraction
   351â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   352â†’
   353â†’/** Best-effort extraction of tool event summaries from a raw JSONL file. */
   354â†’function extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath: string, _client: string): string[] {
   355â†’  const summaries: string[] = []
   356â†’  let content: string
   357â†’  try {
   358â†’    content = readFileSync(rawPath, 'utf-8')
   359â†’  } catch {
   360â†’    return []
   361â†’  }
   362â†’
   363â†’  for (const line of content.split('\n')) {
   364â†’    const trimmed = line.trim()
   365â†’    if (!trimmed) continue
   366â†’    try {
   367â†’      const record = JSON.parse(trimmed) as Record<string, unknown>
   368â†’      // Codex: function_call type
   369â†’      const type = record['type'] as string | undefined
   370â†’      if (type === 'function_call' || type === 'custom_tool_call') {
   371â†’        const name = (record['name'] as string | undefined) ?? type
   372â†’        summaries.push(name)
   373â†’        continue
   374â†’      }
   375â†’      // Claude: tool_use content blocks
   376â†’      const payload = record['message'] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined
   377â†’      const content2 = (payload?.['content'] ?? record['content']) as unknown[] | undefined
   378â†’      if (Array.isArray(content2)) {
   379â†’        for (const block of content2) {
   380â†’          if (
   381â†’            block !== null &&
   382â†’            typeof block === 'object' &&
   383â†’            (block as Record<string, unknown>)['type'] === 'tool_use'
   384â†’          ) {
   385â†’            const name = ((block as Record<string, unknown>)['name'] as string | undefined) ?? 'tool_use'
   386â†’            summaries.push(name)
   387â†’          }
   388â†’        }
   389â†’      }
   390â†’    } catch {
   391â†’      // Skip malformed lines
   392â†’    }
   393â†’  }
   394â†’
   395â†’  return summaries
   396â†’}
   397â†’
   398â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   399â†’// Output path helpers
   400â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   401â†’
   402â†’function transcriptOutputPath(output: string, m: ManifestEntry): string {
   403â†’  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''
   404â†’  const stem = cleanPath ? basename(cleanPath, '.md') : m.session_id
   405â†’  return join(output, 'transcripts', m.client, `${stem}.html`)
   406â†’}
   407â†’
   408â†’function resolveRawPath(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): string | null {
   409â†’  if (m.repo_raw_path) {
   410â†’    return join(root, m.repo_raw_path)
   411â†’  }
   412â†’  if (m.global_raw_path) {
   413â†’    return m.global_raw_path
   414â†’  }
   415â†’  return null
   416â†’}
   417â†’
   418â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   419â†’// Markdown file loader (for goals/knowledge/todos/archive)
   420â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   421â†’
   422â†’function loadMarkdownFiles(dir: string): Array<{ filename: string; title: string; content: string }> {
   423â†’  if (!existsSync(dir)) return []
   424â†’
   425â†’  let entries: string[]
   426â†’  try {
   427â†’    entries = readdirSync(dir)
   428â†’  } catch {
   429â†’    return []
   430â†’  }
   431â†’
   432â†’  return entries
   433â†’    .filter(e => e.endsWith('.md'))
   434â†’    .sort()
   435â†’    .map(filename => {
   436â†’      const fullPath = join(dir, filename)
   437â†’      let content = ''
   438â†’      try {
   439â†’        content = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
   440â†’      } catch {
   441â†’        // empty
   442â†’      }
   443â†’      const title = extractMarkdownTitle(content) || basename(filename, '.md')

   446â†’}
   447â†’
   448â†’function extractMarkdownTitle(content: string): string {
   449â†’  const match = content.match(/^#\s+(.+)$/m)
   450â†’  return match?.[1]?.trim() ?? ''

   452â†’
   453â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   454â†’// .gitignore management

   457â†’export function ensureGitignore(root: string, entry: string): void {
   458â†’  const gitignorePath = join(root, '.gitignore')
   459â†’  let existing = ''
   460â†’  if (existsSync(gitignorePath)) {
   461â†’    try {
   462â†’      existing = readFileSync(gitignorePath, 'utf-8')
   463â†’    } catch {
   464â†’      return
   465â†’    }
   466â†’  }
   467â†’  // Check if already present (normalize line endings)
   468â†’  const lines = existing.replace(/\r\n/g, '\n').split('\n')
   469â†’  if (lines.some(l => l.trim() === entry.trim())) return
   470â†’
   471â†’  // Append with trailing newline
   472â†’  const append = existing.endsWith('\n') ? entry + '\n' : '\n' + entry + '\n'
   473â†’  try {
   474â†’    appendFileSync(gitignorePath, append, 'utf-8')
   475â†’  } catch {
   476â†’    // Best-effort
   477â†’  }

    12â†’export interface GithubPagesOptions {

    24â†’const BRANCH_RE = /^[a-zA-Z0-9._/-]+$/
    25â†’
    26â†’export async function deployGithubPages(options: GithubPagesOptions): Promise<void> {
    27â†’  const { repoRoot, outputDir, branch, cname } = options
    28â†’  const logger = getLogger()
    29â†’

    31â†’
    32â†’  // Validate branch name to prevent any injection
    33â†’  if (!BRANCH_RE.test(branch)) {
    34â†’    logger.warn(`[gh-pages] Invalid branch name, skipping deploy: "${branch}"`)
    35â†’    return
    36â†’  }
    37â†’
    38â†’  try {
    39â†’    // 1. Write CNAME file if configured
    40â†’    if (cname) {
    41â†’      const cnamePath = join(outputDir, 'CNAME')
    42â†’      writeFileSync(cnamePath, cname + '\n', 'utf-8')
    43â†’      logger.info(`[gh-pages] CNAME written: ${cname}`)
    44â†’    }
    45â†’
    46â†’    // 2. Check if branch exists on remote
    47â†’    let branchExists = false
    48â†’    try {
    49â†’      git(repoRoot, 'ls-remote', '--exit-code', '--heads', 'origin', branch)
    50â†’      branchExists = true
    51â†’    } catch {
    52â†’      branchExists = false
    53â†’    }
    54â†’
    55â†’    if (!branchExists) {
    56â†’      // Create orphan branch via a temporary worktree in os.tmpdir()
    57â†’      logger.info(`[gh-pages] Branch '${branch}' not found, creating orphan...`)
    58â†’      const worktreePath = join(tmpdir(), `mt-gh-pages-${Date.now()}`)
    59â†’      try {
    60â†’        git(repoRoot, 'worktree', 'add', '--orphan', '-b', branch, worktreePath)
    61â†’        git(worktreePath, 'commit', '--allow-empty', '-m', 'chore: init gh-pages')
    62â†’        git(repoRoot, 'push', 'origin', branch)
    63â†’      } finally {
    64â†’        try { git(repoRoot, 'worktree', 'remove', '--force', worktreePath) } catch { /* ignore */ }

    67â†’
    68â†’    // 3. Push using git subtree
    69â†’    const relOutput = makeRelative(repoRoot, outputDir)
    70â†’    logger.info(`[gh-pages] Pushing ${relOutput} to origin/${branch}...`)
    71â†’    git(repoRoot, 'subtree', 'push', '--prefix', relOutput, 'origin', branch)
    72â†’    logger.info(`[gh-pages] Successfully pushed to origin/${branch}`)
    73â†’  } catch (err: unknown) {
    74â†’    logger.warn(`[gh-pages] Deploy failed: ${String(err)}`)

    82â†’
    83â†’/** Invoke git with explicit args â€” no shell interpolation. */
    84â†’function git(cwd: string, ...args: string[]): string {
    85â†’  return execFileSync('git', args, { cwd, stdio: 'pipe' }).toString()
    86â†’}
    87â†’
    88â†’function makeRelative(base: string, target: string): string {
    89â†’  // Normalize separators
    90â†’  const b = base.replace(/\\/g, '/').replace(/\/$/, '')

    92â†’  if (t.startsWith(b + '/')) {
    93â†’    return t.slice(b.length + 1)
    94â†’  }
    95â†’  return t
    96â†’}

1â†’/**
     2â†’ * Webhook notification: sends a POST to configurable endpoints.
     3â†’ * Supports Feishu, Telegram, Discord, Slack, and generic webhooks.
     4â†’ * Never throws â€” failures are logged as warnings.
     5â†’ */
     6â†’
     7â†’import { getLogger } from '../../heartbeat/log.js'
     8â†’
     9â†’export interface WebhookOptions {
    10â†’  url: string
    11â†’  sessionCount: number
    12â†’  newSessionIds?: string[]
    13â†’  reportUrl?: string
    14â†’}
    15â†’
    16â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    17â†’// Platform detection
    18â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    19â†’
    20â†’type Platform = 'feishu' | 'telegram' | 'discord' | 'slack' | 'generic'
    21â†’
    22â†’function detectPlatform(url: string): Platform {
    23â†’  if (url.includes('open.feishu.cn') || url.includes('open.larksuite.com')) return 'feishu'
    24â†’  if (url.includes('api.telegram.org')) return 'telegram'
    25â†’  if (url.includes('discord.com/api/webhooks') || url.includes('discordapp.com/api/webhooks')) return 'discord'
    26â†’  if (url.includes('hooks.slack.com')) return 'slack'
    27â†’  return 'generic'
    28â†’}
    29â†’
    30â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    31â†’// Payload builders
    32â†’// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    33â†’
    34â†’function buildFeishuPayload(options: WebhookOptions): Record<string, unknown> {
    35â†’  const { sessionCount, newSessionIds = [], reportUrl } = options
    36â†’  const newCount = newSessionIds.length
    37â†’  const actionBtn = reportUrl
    38â†’    ? [{
    39â†’        tag: 'button',
    40â†’        text: { content: 'View Report', tag: 'plain_text' },
    41â†’        url: reportUrl,
    42â†’        type: 'primary',
    43â†’      }]
    44â†’    : []
    45â†’
    46â†’  return {
    47â†’    msg_type: 'interactive',
    48â†’    card: {
    49â†’      header: {
    50â†’        title: { content: 'MemoryTree Report Updated', tag: 'plain_text' },
    51â†’        template: 'blue',
    52â†’      },
    53â†’      elements: [
    54â†’        {
    55â†’          tag: 'div',
    56â†’          text: {
    57â†’            tag: 'lark_md',
    58â†’            content: `**Sessions:** ${sessionCount} total${newCount ? `, ${newCount} new` : ''}`,
    59â†’          },
    60â†’        },
    61â†’        ...(actionBtn.length > 0 ? [{ tag: 'action', actions: actionBtn }] : []),
    62â†’      ],
    63â†’    },
    64â†’  }
    65â†’}
    66â†’
    67â†’function buildTelegramPayload(options: WebhookOptions): Record<string, unknown> {
    68â†’  const { sessionCount, newSessionIds = [], reportUrl } = options
    69â†’  const newCount = newSessionIds.length
    70â†’  let text = `ًں“ٹ *MemoryTree Report Updated*\n\nSessions: ${sessionCount} total`
    71â†’  if (newCount > 0) text += `, ${newCount} new`
    72â†’  if (reportUrl) text += `\n[View Report](${reportUrl})`
    73â†’  return { text, parse_mode: 'Markdown' }
    74â†’}
